name: Filesystem storage module
description: Implement the filesystem storage layer that manages dashcam files on disk. Follows the layout STORAGE_PATH/dongle_id/route/segment/filename. Provides methods for storing uploaded files, retrieving file paths, checking existence, and listing segments for a route.
acceptance_criteria: internal/storage/storage.go exports a Storage type with configurable base path
Store(dongleID, route, segment, filename string, data io.Reader) writes file to correct path
Path(dongleID, route, segment, filename string) returns the absolute file path
Exists(dongleID, route, segment, filename string) checks if a file exists
ListSegments(dongleID, route string) returns segment numbers for a route
Creates directories automatically when storing files
Unit tests using t.TempDir() cover store, retrieve, exists, and list operations
go build and go vet pass cleanly
